message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-budget-engine): pin BudgetPolicyEngine async wrapper + zone lifecycle (br-q7zx4)

BudgetPolicyEngine is the async PolicyEngine wrapper around
BudgetTracker (br-55yv3) that backs invoke-budget admission via the
host preflight pipeline. It adds per-zone policy lifecycle, opt-in
evaluation (Option<...> returns for un-configured zones), sorted
multi-zone reporting, and zone filtering. Zero conformance coverage.

Adds 10 tests against the public fcp_host::BudgetPolicyEngine API:

- record_usage_on_unconfigured_zone_returns_none (CRITICAL: no
  policy means no enforcement, NOT implicit zero-cap — a regression
  here would suddenly start denying every previously-unrestricted
  invoke)
- snapshot_on_unconfigured_zone_returns_none
- record_usage_on_configured_zone_evaluates_and_returns_some
- upsert_policy_replaces_prior_policy (atomic replace; new limit
  reflected on next call)
- remove_policy_returns_prior_and_makes_zone_unconfigured (caller
  gets the prior policy back and subsequent record_usage is None)
- remove_policy_on_unknown_zone_returns_none (idempotent no-op
  detectable by caller)
- with_policies_constructor_seeds_initial_state (bulk-load works
  for every preconfigured zone; un-configured ones still None)
- report_returns_snapshots_sorted_by_zone_id (CLI determinism — diffs
  across reports stay stable)
- report_with_zone_filter_narrows_to_single_zone
- report_with_unknown_zone_filter_returns_empty

All 10 pass locally in 0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
host_budget_policy_engine_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
